Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I apologize for the sudden announcement. The reason I called you here is—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It's because people are saying I stole money, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Yes, that's right. I happened to overhear the rumors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}First, I'd like to hear from you directly on whether you actually did it or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}No, I can't keep doing this. I need to stand up for myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro's lips are trembling.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Considering all the work you've been doing for the student council, I can't imagine you'd be the type to steal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I fully expected it to be nothing but a baseless rumor. I just wanted to hear it directly from you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Miss President... Th-Thank you so much...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That said, we can't expect everyone else to be as understanding.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}As you have seen, people are openly sullying your reputation because they don't know you as well as we do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 25 25 20}I'll figure something out for the time being. That's my duty as the student council president.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'd like your opinion on how to proceed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You've spent more time with Fushimi, so you understand her situation much better than I do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I wish I could handle this right away, but I have other business to take care of...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 25 25 20}You don't have plans tonight, do you? Come to my room when you're available.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}And I'd prefer you try not to be seen by anyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Alone...? I'm not sure I understand the problem.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 25 25 20}If too many people get involved, it could draw unwanted attention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}The two of us can handle this, so you—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}All I have to do is clear my name, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I... I can do something about it on my own![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 22 0 109 25 25 20}I'm going to demand an explanation from the teacher![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I understand you must be under a lot of stress because of those unfounded rumors. I'm sorry I didn't realize it sooner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Leave the rest to us, Fushimi. You don't need to get involved any further. You've done enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}All right, you can go now. Sorry for taking up your time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}All I've done so far is rely on {f 4 1}-san, and now I'm doing it to you too, Miss President.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}The truth is, I haven't done anything at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I told myself it would be different this time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 10 25 25}And if I leave this for someone else to fix, I'm never going to be able to change![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}So Miss President, please let me handle this! I'll go and speak with Mr. Takenozuka![n]{f 1 1}
